purpose: Rejection-demo fixture: TYK2/deucravacitinib evaluated for an IBD hypothesis.
provenance_note: Illustrative fixture, NOT a verified ontology/clinical snapshot. disease_id MONDO_0005265 matches evals/cases.jsonl GC-002; sub-indication ids use a FIX: namespace to avoid asserting unverified MONDO mappings. Trial source_refs use a fixture:// scheme and are not real registry identifiers.
unverified_claims: Row count in chembl_500.json is illustrative and is NOT a verified ChEMBL count (see harness.yaml R-002).
Failed-trial source_refs are placeholders, not fabricated NCT numbers.
